name: Cold Cucumber Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 and 1/2 tablespoons fresh lemon juice, strained
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, seed, and slice the cucumbers.
2. In a heavy 10 to 12-inch skillet, sauté the cucumbers and scallions in heated butter and oil for about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in the flour and cook slowly for 3 to 4 minutes, stirring frequently.
4. In a 2-quart saucepan, heat the chicken broth and milk. Slowly stir this into the cucumber mixture.
5. Add the strained lemon juice, dill weed, salt, and pepper. Simmer gently, stirring, for about 10 minutes until thickened.
6. Transfer to a blender and process until smooth.
7. Pour the soup into a large mixing bowl and cool completely.
8. Add sour cream and taste for seasoning. Cover and refrigerate for at least 6 hours.
9. Serve in chilled soup bowls, garnished with chopped chives.
